title: Gridline Getaway
attractText:
GRIDLINE GETAWAY
Button 1: START / PHASE DASH
Button 2: BRAKE SHIELD
Stick: switch lanes one step per press

Outrun the tiny swarm through shifting lane traps.
Reach the exit gate before panic hits 100.
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><style>html,body{margin:0;background:#0a0f1e;color:#eaf2ff;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}canvas{width:min(96vmin,960px);height:min(96vmin,960px);image-rendering:pixelated;box-shadow:0 0 30px #000;background:#0c1224}</style></head><body><canvas id="game" width="960" height="960"></canvas><script>(function(){const c=document.getElementById('game'),x=c.getContext('2d');const W=960,H=960;let state='title',t=0,last=0;const lanes=7,rows=9,left=150,right=810,topY=170,bottomY=820;const laneGap=(right-left)/(lanes-1),rowGap=(bottomY-topY)/(rows-1);const player={lane:3,row:8,shield:0,dash:0};let enemies=[],bolts=[],sparks=[],panic=0,dist=0,level=1,msgTimer=0;let audio=null;function A(){if(audio)return;try{audio=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();}catch(e){}}function beep(f,d,t,v){if(!audio)return;const o=audio.createOscillator(),g=audio.createGain();o.type=t||'square';o.frequency.value=f;g.gain.value=v||0.03;o.connect(g);g.connect(audio.destination);const n=audio.currentTime;g.gain.setValueAtTime(g.gain.value,n);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,n+d);o.start(n);o.stop(n+d);}function noise(d,v){if(!audio)return;const len=Math.max(1,Math.floor(audio.sampleRate*d)),b=audio.createBuffer(1,len,audio.sampleRate),data=b.getChannelData(0);for(let i=0;i<len;i++)data[i]=(Math.random()*2-1)*(1-i/len);const s=audio.createBufferSource(),g=audio.createGain();s.buffer=b;s.connect(g);g.connect(audio.destination);g.gain.value=v||0.05;s.start();}function input(){return window.arcadeInput||{};}function reset(){player.lane=3;player.row=8;player.shield=0;player.dash=0;enemies=[];bolts=[];sparks=[];panic=0;dist=0;level=1;msgTimer=0;spawnWave();state='play';beep(330,.08,'square',.05);beep(550,.12,'triangle',.04);}function laneX(i){return left+i*laneGap}function rowY(i){return topY+i*rowGap}function spawnWave(){const count=10+level*4;for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const side=Math.random()<0.5?-1:1;const r=Math.floor(Math.random()*rows);const y=rowY(r)+(Math.random()-.5)*20;const speed=(80+Math.random()*70+level*12)*side;enemies.push({x:side<0?left-40:right+40,y,laneBias:Math.floor(Math.random()*lanes),vx:-speed,phase:Math.random()*6.28,size:12+Math.random()*8});}for(let i=0;i<2+Math.floor(level/2);i++){const gap=Math.floor(Math.random()*lanes);const yy=topY+80+Math.random()*(bottomY-topY-160);bolts.push({y:yy,gap,gapW:1+(Math.random()<0.35?1:0),vx:80+level*12});}}function burst(px,py,col,n){for(let i=0;i<n;i++)sparks.push({x:px,y:py,vx:(Math.random()*2-1)*240,vy:(Math.random()*2-1)*240,life:.3+.4*Math.random(),c:col});}function hit(){if(player.shield>0)return;panic+=23;player.shield=.7;noise(.12,.08);beep(120,.16,'sawtooth',.05);burst(laneX(player.lane),rowY(player.row),'#ff5a7a',18);if(panic>=100){state='lose';msgTimer=1.5;beep(80,.4,'sawtooth',.07);}}function update(dt){const i=input();if((i.button1Pressed||i.button2Pressed)&&audio&&audio.state==='suspended')audio.resume();if(state==='title'){if(i.button1||i.button1Pressed){A(); if(audio&&audio.state==='suspended')audio.resume(); reset();}return;} if(state==='lose'||state==='win'){msgTimer-=dt;if(i.button1Pressed&&msgTimer<=0){reset();}return;} t+=dt;if(i.leftPressed&&player.lane>0){player.lane--;beep(220,.04,'square',.03);}if(i.rightPressed&&player.lane<lanes-1){player.lane++;beep(260,.04,'square',.03);}if(i.upPressed&&player.row>0){player.row--;beep(300,.04,'square',.03);}if(i.downPressed&&player.row<rows-1){player.row++;beep(180,.04,'square',.03);}if(i.button1Pressed&&player.dash<=0){player.dash=.22;dist+=6;panic=Math.max(0,panic-6);beep(720,.06,'square',.05);beep(960,.08,'triangle',.03);burst(laneX(player.lane),rowY(player.row),'#8efcff',12);}if(i.button2Pressed&&player.shield<=0){player.shield=.45;panic+=2;beep(180,.08,'triangle',.04);}player.dash=Math.max(0,player.dash-dt);player.shield=Math.max(0,player.shield-dt);panic+=dt*(7+level*1.2);dist+=dt*(10+level*1.2)+(player.dash>0?dt*60:0);if(dist>90*level){if(level>=4){state='win';msgTimer=1.2;beep(660,.1,'triangle',.05);beep(880,.12,'triangle',.05);beep(1320,.16,'triangle',.05);}else{level++;dist=0;spawnWave();beep(440,.08,'square',.05);beep(660,.1,'square',.04);}}for(const e of enemies){e.x+=e.vx*dt*(player.dash>0?1.45:1);e.y+=Math.sin(t*3+e.phase)*18*dt*(1+level*.2);if(e.x<left-70){e.x=right+70;e.y=rowY(Math.floor(Math.random()*rows));e.vx=-(80+Math.random()*70+level*12);}if(e.x>right+70){e.x=left-70;e.y=rowY(Math.floor(Math.random()*rows));e.vx=(80+Math.random()*70+level*12);}const px=laneX(player.lane),py=rowY(player.row);const dx=e.x-px,dy=e.y-py;const rr=e.size+(player.shield>0?18:14);if(dx*dx+dy*dy<rr*rr){hit();e.x+=(e.vx>0?-120:120);}}for(const b of bolts){b.y+=b.vx*dt*.55;if(b.y>bottomY+80)b.y=topY-80;const py=rowY(player.row);if(Math.abs(b.y-py)<20){let safe=player.lane>=b.gap&&player.lane<b.gap+b.gapW;if(!safe)hit();}}for(let j=sparks.length-1;j>=0;j--){const s=sparks[j];s.life-=dt;s.x+=s.vx*dt;s.y+=s.vy*dt;s.vx*=.97;s.vy*=.97;if(s.life<=0)sparks.splice(j,1);}if(panic>=100&&state==='play'){state='lose';msgTimer=1.5;}}function drawGrid(){x.strokeStyle='#1f315e';x.lineWidth=4;for(let i=0;i<lanes;i++){x.beginPath();x.moveTo(laneX(i),topY-40);x.lineTo(laneX(i),bottomY+20);x.stroke();}for(let j=0;j<rows;j++){x.strokeStyle=j===0?'#2dff87':'#1a2745';x.lineWidth=j===0?8:3;x.beginPath();x.moveTo(left-35,rowY(j));x.lineTo(right+35,rowY(j));x.stroke();}}function draw(){x.fillStyle='#0a0f1e';x.fillRect(0,0,W,H);const g=x.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);g.addColorStop(0,'#101a33');g.addColorStop(1,'#07101f');x.fillStyle=g;x.fillRect(0,0,W,H);drawGrid();for(const b of bolts){for(let l=0;l<lanes;l++){if(l>=b.gap&&l<b.gap+b.gapW)continue;x.fillStyle='#ffcf48';x.fillRect(laneX(l)-18,b.y-8,36,16);}}for(const e of enemies){x.fillStyle='#ff5a7a';x.beginPath();x.arc(e.x,e.y,e.size,0,7);x.fill();x.fillStyle='#ffd7df';x.fillRect(e.x-4,e.y-2,8,4);}const px=laneX(player.lane),py=rowY(player.row);if(player.shield>0){x.strokeStyle='rgba(142,252,255,.8)';x.lineWidth=6;x.beginPath();x.arc(px,py,28+Math.sin(t*18)*3,0,7);x.stroke();}x.fillStyle=player.dash>0?'#8efcff':'#2dff87';x.beginPath();x.moveTo(px,py-22);x.lineTo(px+18,py+18);x.lineTo(px-18,py+18);x.closePath();x.fill();for(const s of sparks){x.fillStyle=s.c;x.globalAlpha=Math.max(0,s.life/.6);x.fillRect(s.x,s.y,4,4);x.globalAlpha=1;}x.fillStyle='#eaf2ff';x.font='bold 34px sans-serif';x.fillText('PANIC',90,68);x.strokeStyle='#fff';x.strokeRect(190,38,240,28);x.fillStyle=panic<65?'#2dff87':panic<85?'#ffcf48':'#ff5a7a';x.fillRect(194,42,Math.max(0,232*panic/100),20);x.fillStyle='#eaf2ff';x.fillText('SECTOR '+level,500,68);x.fillText('EXIT '+Math.max(0,Math.ceil((90*level-dist)/10)),710,68);if(state==='title'){x.fillStyle='rgba(4,8,18,.45)';x.fillRect(80,100,800,760);x.textAlign='center';x.fillStyle='#8efcff';x.font='bold 78px sans-serif';x.fillText('GRIDLINE',480,240);x.fillStyle='#2dff87';x.fillText('GETAWAY',480,320);x.font='bold 28px sans-serif';x.fillStyle='#eaf2ff';x.fillText('Dash through lane-locked swarm corridors.',480,430);x.fillText('Stick: move one lane/row per press',480,480);x.fillText('Button 1: phase dash   Button 2: brake shield',480,520);x.fillStyle='#ffcf48';x.fillText('Reach the green exit line before PANIC hits 100.',480,590);x.fillStyle='#ffffff';x.font='bold 36px sans-serif';x.fillText('PRESS BUTTON 1',480,720);x.textAlign='left';}if(state==='lose'||state==='win'){x.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.5)';x.fillRect(120,300,720,280);x.textAlign='center';x.font='bold 82px sans-serif';x.fillStyle=state==='win'?'#2dff87':'#ff5a7a';x.fillText(state==='win'?'ESCAPED!':'OVERRUN!',480,410);x.font='bold 34px sans-serif';x.fillStyle='#eaf2ff';x.fillText(state==='win'?'The gate opens. Chaos loses this round.':'The swarm closes in and panic spikes.',480,470);if(msgTimer<=0){x.fillStyle='#ffcf48';x.fillText('PRESS BUTTON 1 TO RETRY',480,530);}x.textAlign='left';}}function loop(ts){const dt=Math.min(.033,(ts-last||16)/1000);last=ts;update(dt);draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop)}requestAnimationFrame(loop);})();</script></body></html>
